# [PKT-NOD-002](task-0155): Node-Local Status Persistence

## Purpose

Implement node-local status persistence.

## Scope

- Persistence format
- Storage logic
- Recovery

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement storage
3. Add recovery

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Storage works
3. Recovery works
